Instructor Only: Before-After And Trajectories Practice

Worked Reference

diary <- read_csv("data/real/migraine_headache_diary.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

daily_summary <- diary |>
  filter(!is.na(day), !is.na(medication), !is.na(headache_reported)) |>
  group_by(day, medication) |>
  summarise(headache_percent = mean(headache_reported) * 100, .groups = "drop")

ggplot(daily_summary, aes(x = day, y = headache_percent, color = medication)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Headache Reports Over Diary Days",
    x = "Diary day",
    y = "Percent reporting headache",
    color = "Medication"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
